title: Apply Liz script-based rubric refinements to Information Accuracy scores
description:
Update the live SelectQuote HCS Medium-Risk Information Accuracy split scores to match Liz Fossen's authoritative meeting guidance and the 2026-04-01 SelectRx enrollment script.

Acceptance criteria:
- Update score code and official guidelines for the affected Information Accuracy scores in Plexus.
- Validate updated guideline markdown before pushing each changed score version.
- Verify changed scores execute with direct predictions on representative items.
- Record any follow-up platform or policy issues in Kanbus.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Started work. Source of truth for this update is Liz Fossen's meeting guidance plus the 2026-04-01 SelectRx Enrollment Script and FAQ. Planned scope: cost-language rubric refinements for Copay Guarantees / Savings Promises / Ambiguous Cost Language, plus any exact script-driven examples for other Information Accuracy sub-scores that materially change boundaries. Will validate guidelines before each push and verify with direct predictions.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Implemented live score-version updates in Plexus.

Updated score versions:
- Copay Guarantees -> 3e8afad4-273b-4c16-ad5d-64732dcdcc7f
- Savings Promises -> 708ef9eb-c832-41eb-a8d6-32068aa2c18e
- Ambiguous Cost Language -> f9c8ecc5-73d1-41ba-a50f-341265279a10
- High-Pressure Tactics -> 64db3bb0-4edd-4aef-9b57-d59498407a5f
- False Carrier Claims -> 86f79699-ba6f-419f-aeb0-c336c8e4b721
- False Local Pharmacy Claims -> 37649fc7-9bc2-4a43-9ce1-db012604c1c3
- False Service Claims -> bedd9779-0560-4721-8946-465d0aff2aca

Applied changes:
- Copay Guarantees: hypothetical/qualified copay phrasing is compliant unless turned into a guarantee.
- Savings Promises: added exact prohibited script phrases and Healthcare Select membership carveout.
- Ambiguous Cost Language: anchored compliant no-additional-cost language to the script plus explicit copay clarification.
- High-Pressure Tactics: added coercive consent / membership-step examples and compliant consent language.
- False Carrier Claims: added exact UHC/Aetna misattribution examples and compliant insurance-preservation language.
- False Local Pharmacy Claims: added exact transition examples and temporary local-refill carveout.
- False Service Claims: initially overfired on script-approved timing/updates; revised to allow conditional first-shipment timing up to 4 weeks and automated text/email delivery updates.

Validation and verification:
- Validated guideline markdown before each push with plexus_guidelines_validate.
- Direct predictions succeeded on the updated versions.
- Item 308889128: Savings Promises=No, Ambiguous Cost Language=Yes, High-Pressure Tactics=Yes, False Carrier Claims=Yes, False Local Pharmacy Claims=Yes, False Service Claims=Yes after the final refinement.
- Item 308639116: False Carrier Claims=No, False Service Claims=No, Copay Guarantees=Yes, False Local Pharmacy Claims=Yes.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:

Champion versions:
- Copay Guarantees -> 3e8afad4-273b-4c16-ad5d-64732dcdcc7f
- Savings Promises -> 708ef9eb-c832-41eb-a8d6-32068aa2c18e
- Ambiguous Cost Language -> f9c8ecc5-73d1-41ba-a50f-341265279a10
- High-Pressure Tactics -> 64db3bb0-4edd-4aef-9b57-d59498407a5f
- False Carrier Claims -> 86f79699-ba6f-419f-aeb0-c336c8e4b721
- False Local Pharmacy Claims -> 37649fc7-9bc2-4a43-9ce1-db012604c1c3
- False Service Claims -> bedd9779-0560-4721-8946-465d0aff2aca

Post-promotion verification: each score record now points championVersionId at the intended version.
